mapper.sql: id, api_id, base_url, api_key, completions_path, embeddings_path, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_client_api (api_id, base_url, api_key, completions_path, embeddings_path, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{apiId}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{completionsPath}, #{embeddingsPath}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_client_api SET api_id = #{apiId}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, api_key = #{apiKey}, completions_path = #{completionsPath}, embeddings_path = #{embeddingsPath}, status = #{status}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_client_api ORDER BY id DESC
